item.description: I am a 19 y.o. Electronic and Computer Engineering international student, from Italy, at the University of York (UK). I am passionate about anything that works with 1s and 0s. I am also a motorsports fan.

CrunchyWrap CrunchyWrap is an Android app that allows you to stream content from CrunchyRoll. It makes use of the private CrunchyRoll’s API and is only a PoC of how to interact with REST APIs. Source Code Documentation DeskWidget DeskWidget is a “smart” desk clock. It displays the time and what’s the weather like in any user defined location. It uses an Atmega328P-PU to drive an E-INK display and retrievs data from the internet using an ESP-01.
